title: Create wand collection tracking app with friend system

requirements.text: Create a backend Wand type with fields for id (Text), name (Text), owner (Principal), and createdAt (Int) timestamp

quotes: Can I please make an app where I can count my wands and name what wands I have

acceptanceCriteria: Wand type is defined in backend/main.mo
Each wand has a unique id, name, owner principal, and creation timestamp
Wand type uses stable data structures for persistence

requirements.text: Implement backend functions to create a new wand, retrieve all wands for a user, retrieve a specific wand by id, update a wand's name, and delete a wand

quotes: Can I please make an app where I can count my wands and name what wands I have

acceptanceCriteria: addWand function creates a wand with generated id and returns the wand
getMyWands function returns all wands owned by the caller
getWandById function returns a specific wand by id
updateWandName function allows owners to rename their wands
deleteWand function allows owners to remove their wands
All functions enforce ownership validation

requirements.text: Create a backend Friendship type and implement friend request system with functions to send friend requests, accept requests, reject requests, get pending requests, and get confirmed friends list

quotes: be able to have friends and see there wands two

acceptanceCriteria: Friendship type tracks requester, recipient, status (pending/accepted/rejected), and timestamp
sendFriendRequest function creates a pending friendship request
acceptFriendRequest function changes status to accepted
rejectFriendRequest function changes status to rejected
getPendingRequests returns requests where user is recipient and status is pending
getFriends returns list of users where friendship status is accepted
Prevents duplicate friend requests between same users

requirements.text: Implement backend function to retrieve wands belonging to a friend, returning wands only if a confirmed friendship exists between the caller and the wand owner

quotes: be able to have friends and see there wands two

acceptanceCriteria: getFriendWands function accepts a Principal parameter for the friend
Function returns wands only if caller and friend have accepted friendship
Returns empty array if no friendship exists or friendship is not accepted
Includes wand count for the friend

requirements.text: Create a MyWandsPage component displaying the authenticated user's wand collection with wand count, list of wands showing names, and buttons to add new wands, edit wand names, and delete wands

quotes: Can I please make an app where I can count my wands and name what wands I have

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays total wand count prominently
Each wand is displayed in a card or list item showing its name
Add Wand button opens a form or modal to create a new wand
Each wand has edit and delete buttons
Empty state message displayed when user has no wands
Uses React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations

requirements.text: Create an AddWandForm component with a text input for wand name and submit button that calls the backend addWand function
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes a text input for wand name with validation
Submit button triggers addWand mutation
Success toast displayed after wand is created
Form resets after successful submission
Loading state shown during submission

requirements.text: Create a FriendsPage component displaying the user's friends list, pending friend requests, and a section to search and send friend requests to other users by their username or userId
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows list of confirmed friends with their names and profile pictures
Pending friend requests section shows incoming requests with accept/reject buttons
Search or input field to find users and send friend requests
Each friend entry is clickable to view their wand collection
Uses React Query hooks for fetching friends and pending requests

requirements.text: Create a FriendWandsPage component that displays a friend's wand collection including their wand count and list of wand names, accessible by clicking on a friend from the FriendsPage
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays friend's name and total wand count
Shows list of friend's wands with names
Back button or link to return to friends list
Uses React Query hook to fetch friend's wands
Shows message if friend has no wands

requirements.text: Update Layout component navigation to include links to My Wands and Friends pages, replacing or alongside existing marketplace navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes 'My Wands' link routing to MyWandsPage
Navigation includes 'Friends' link routing to FriendsPage
Links are visible when user is authenticated
Navigation maintains consistent styling with existing links

requirements.text: Create React Query hooks for all wand-related operations (useMyWands, useAddWand, useUpdateWandName, useDeleteWand, useFriendWands) and friend-related operations (useFriends, usePendingRequests, useSendFriendRequest, useAcceptRequest, useRejectRequest)
acceptanceCriteria: All hooks use useActor to get backend actor instance
Mutations invalidate relevant queries on success
Hooks handle loading and error states
Success/error toasts displayed for mutations

requirements.text: Update App.tsx to include routes for MyWandsPage (/my-wands), FriendsPage (/friends), and FriendWandsPage (/friends/:userId/wands)
acceptanceCriteria: Routes are added to TanStack Router configuration
All routes are accessible when user is authenticated
FriendWandsPage route includes userId parameter

requirements.text: Design a magical wand-themed visual style with mystical aesthetics including deep woods colors (oak browns, ebony blacks, mahogany reds), starlight accents, and elegant serif typography that evokes a wand collector's aesthetic throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses warm wood tones and starlight accents
Typography uses elegant serif fonts for headings
Consistent theme applied across all new components
Visual style distinct from previous marketplace theme

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use React, Shadcn, Tailwind, and React Query for frontend
nonGoals: Marketplace functionality (item listings, shopping cart, checkout, messaging)
Wand rarity or magical properties system

required: Elegant crossed wands icon with starlight sparkles on dark wood background (wand-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Mystical wand collection hero banner with magical glow effects and dark atmospheric background (wand-hero.dim_1200x400.png)
